lemon_market_new_listings.description: This vehicle is in poor condition. Both the interior and exterior show significant wear, including noticeable cosmetic damage and rust. Several mechanical and electrical systems are currently non-functional and require repair.
The car is in good condition. It shows minor cosmetic wear on the exterior and interior. All mechanical systems are fully operational and the vehicle has been well-maintained.
Good condition.

This vehicle is in good condition and has been reliably maintained throughout its life. The exterior presents well, though there are a few minor stone chips on the front bumper and a small, shallow scuff on the passenger side door. The interior is clean and well-kept, showing only normal signs of use. Mechanically, the car is sound, having received regular oil changes and scheduled maintenance. It offers a comfortable ride and dependable performance, making it an excellent choice for anyone seeking a well-cared-for pre-owned vehicle.

This vehicle is being sold in poor condition and will require extensive mechanical and cosmetic attention to be fully roadworthy. The exterior shows significant signs of neglect, including several large dents on the passenger side, widespread rust along the wheel wells and door sills, and heavily oxidized paint. Mechanically, the engine exhibits a rough idle and a noticeable oil leak, while the transmission struggles with gear transitions. Inside, the cabin has seen better days; the upholstery is heavily stained and torn in multiple places, several dashboard lights are illuminated, and the air conditioning is currently non-functional. This car is recommended primarily as a project vehicle or for its parts value.

Looking for a dependable daily driver with plenty of life left? This car is a fantastic value! While it shows some honest signs of use and minor cosmetic wear, it remains a reliable and functional choice for its next owner. It’s a great opportunity to get a solid vehicle that’s ready to work for you!

We are pleased to present this exceptional vehicle, preserved in impeccable, showroom-grade condition. Meticulously maintained and displaying no signs of wear, this specimen represents the absolute pinnacle of its class. For the discerning driver who demands uncompromising quality and mechanical perfection, this vehicle offers a peerless ownership opportunity.

Hey there! I’m so excited to find a new home for this absolute gem. Honestly, it’s in such incredible shape, you’d think it just rolled off the showroom floor! I’ve taken such good care of it, and it drives like a dream. If you’re looking for a ride that’s basically perfect and ready for its next adventure, this is the one for you. Feel free to reach out with any questions!
Offered is an exceptional E92 M3, a pinnacle of naturally aspirated performance. At its heart lies the S65 4.0L V8
Mint condition. Garage kept. No mechanical issues. Clean title. Smoke-free interior.

This is a rare opportunity to own a vehicle that remains in absolute showroom state. The exterior features a deep, lustrous finish that has been professionally ceramic coated, showing no rock chips, swirl marks, or imperfections of any kind. Every body panel is original with perfect alignment. Inside, the cabin is a time capsule; the premium leather seats show zero bolster wear, the carpets are protected by original factory mats, and the interior still retains its fresh, new-car aroma. Mechanically, the car is beyond reproach, having been maintained with an open-checkbook policy at authorized service centers. It has been exclusively garage-kept under a breathable cover and never driven in rain or inclement weather. This single-owner gem comes complete with a full documented service history, all original keys, the window sticker, and owner's manuals. For the discerning collector or enthusiast who accepts nothing less than perfection, this vehicle represents the pinnacle of its model year.

We are pleased to present this exemplary vehicle, maintained to the highest standards of automotive excellence. This unit remains in showroom condition, exhibiting no discernible wear and reflecting a history of meticulous stewardship. An acquisition of this caliber represents a rare opportunity for the discerning collector or enthusiast seeking an uncompromising driving experience.

We are proud to present this extraordinary vehicle, preserved in impeccable, showroom-grade condition. Meticulously maintained and showing no discernible wear, this specimen represents the pinnacle of its class. For the discerning collector or enthusiast who demands nothing short of perfection, this vehicle offers an uncompromising standard of performance and aesthetic integrity.

Hey there! I’m parting ways with my absolute pride and joy. This beauty is in incredible shape—honestly, it looks and drives like it just rolled off the showroom floor! I’ve babied this car since day one, keeping it spotless and strictly following every service schedule. If you’re looking for a ride that’s basically perfect and ready for a new home, this is the one. Come take a look, you won't be disappointed!

Offering an investment-grade E46 M3 in museum-quality condition. This example features the legendary S54 3.2L inline-six, delivering linear power through six individual throttle bodies and optimized by a flawlessly serviced double VANOS system. The Getrag 6-speed manual transmission provides tactile, short-throw engagement, channeling torque to a variable M-differential. The chassis has undergone preventative subframe reinforcement and retains its factory-spec torsional rigidity. Every bushing and suspension component remains within tight tolerances, ensuring the precise turn-in and feedback characteristic of a true driver’s machine. No fluid leaks, no deferred maintenance, and a compression-tested block that holds factory-spec PSI across all six cylinders. This is a turn-key, high-revving masterpiece for the discerning collector.
Mint condition. Original paint. No scratches or dents. Smoke-free interior. Full service records included. Runs like new.

This extraordinary vehicle is a true collector’s dream, maintained in showroom condition since day one. The exterior boasts a deep, mirror-like finish free of any swirl marks, chips, or imperfections, while the interior remains factory-fresh with the original leather scent and zero signs of wear on the bolsters or carpets. Every component, from the meticulously detailed engine bay to the pristine undercarriage, reflects a life of climate-controlled storage and obsessive preventative maintenance. Complete with all original documentation, spare keys, and a comprehensive service log, this car offers a rare opportunity to own a piece of automotive perfection that looks, feels, and drives exactly as it did the day it left the dealership.

We are pleased to offer this peerless example, presented in superlative condition. This vehicle has been curated with meticulous attention to detail, resulting in an unblemished aesthetic and mechanical profile that mirrors its original factory delivery. Every component has been preserved to an exacting standard, ensuring a driving experience that is as flawless as its presentation. This is a definitive acquisition for the discerning buyer who demands a specimen indistinguishable from new.

Presenting an automotive specimen of unparalleled caliber, maintained to a standard that rivals its original showroom state. This vehicle exhibits a flawless exterior finish complemented by a pristine, smoke-free interior, reflecting a legacy of meticulous preservation. Mechanically impeccable and aesthetically superior, it represents a premier acquisition for the discerning professional seeking excellence without compromise.

Hey there! I am so excited to share this absolute gem with you! Honestly, this car is in such incredible shape, it feels like it just rolled right off the showroom floor. It’s been pampered and garage-kept since day one, so it's looking absolutely flawless inside and out. It drives like a total dream and is just waiting for someone who will love it as much as I have. You’ve really got to see it in person to believe how beautiful it is—come take a look!

This vehicle remains in showroom condition, having been meticulously maintained in a climate-controlled garage since its initial purchase. The exterior features a deep, mirror-like finish with a professional ceramic coating, entirely free of stone chips, swirl marks, or door dings. It sits on a fresh set of manufacturer-spec tires and includes all original keys, manuals, and documented maintenance records. This is an investment-grade vehicle for the collector who accepts nothing less than perfection.

Presenting an exemplary specimen maintained to the highest standards of automotive excellence. We are proud to present this superlative specimen, currently maintained in showroom condition. This vehicle represents the pinnacle of its class, featuring an unblemished exterior and a cabin that remains indistinguishable from new. Meticulously preserved and mechanically beyond reproach, this offering is intended for the most discerning clientele who demand excellence without compromise. A rare opportunity to acquire a vehicle of this caliber.

Hey there! You've seriously got to see this beauty in person—it's basically like it just rolled off the showroom floor! I've babied this car since day one, so it's in absolutely flawless condition inside and out. It drives like a dream and looks even better. If you're looking for something that's been loved and meticulously maintained, this is the one for you. I'm so excited for the next owner to get behind the wheel!

Mint condition. Flawless exterior. Interior like new. Mechanicals perfect. Clean title. Garage kept.

This vehicle is a true 'time capsule' find, presented in showroom condition that must be seen to be believed. Meticulously maintained and stored exclusively in a climate-controlled garage, the exterior boasts a deep, mirror-like finish with absolutely zero imperfections, scratches, or swirl marks. Every body panel is original, and the paint retains its factory-fresh luster. Inside, the cabin remains in pristine state; the premium leather upholstery is supple with no signs of creasing or wear, and the interior still carries a hint of that 'new car' scent. All electronic components and driver-assist features function flawlessly. Mechanically, this car is beyond reproach, benefiting from a comprehensive service history performed only by certified technicians. It drives with the same precision, power, and smoothness as the day it rolled off the assembly line. This is a rare opportunity for a discerning collector or enthusiast to own a flawless example of this model. Complete with all original keys, manuals, and service records.

Presented for your consideration is an exemplary specimen of automotive excellence, maintained to an impeccable standard. This vehicle remains in showroom condition, exhibiting flawless aesthetic integrity and mechanical precision. A rare opportunity for the discerning enthusiast to acquire a truly pristine asset that transcends the typical secondary market offering.
